heading: Prerequisites
body:
- Only MongoDB Support can do the following actions:

  - Approve requests to disable a Backup Compliance Policy.

  - Disable [Configure Backup Options for the Cluster](create-cluster-backups) if the
    Backup Compliance Policy has the
    **Require Point in Time Restore to all clusters** option
    set to **On**.

  - Reduce the [Continuous Cloud Backup Restore Window](create-pit-policy).

  - Delete [Hourly Snapshot Retention Time](creating-backup-policy) specified in
    the Backup Compliance Policy.

- Only the specified security or legal representative can
  [MongoDB Support](request-support).

- You can apply a Backup Compliance Policy to `M10+` dedicated clusters only.

  > **Note:** You can't convert a dedicated cluster to a Free cluster (formerly known as `M0`)
  > or a Flex cluster.
